summary: The monitor page has a separate labeling trust panel, clear CTA state, and uses the summary API without disturbing run stream behavior.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Separate labeling section exists
checks.expected: Monitor has a dedicated labeling UI
checks.actual: Source and built bundle include Start Labeling, labeling status, and labels status copy

checks.name: CHECK-02: Progress counters shown
checks.actual: Monitor renders labeled/total plus fallback and failed counts from LabelSummaryResponse

checks.name: CHECK-03: Labeling UI does not replace run stream
checks.actual: run step list and event log remain separate from labelSummary state and label-panel

checks.name: CHECK-04: Loading and error states
checks.command: Review MonitorPage CTA labels and error rendering
checks.actual: Monitor uses Refreshing Labels..., Starting Labeling..., and renders labelError separately from run error

checks.name: CHECK-05: Warning when labeling still running
checks.command: GET /api/runs/run-755de99fc7/labels/summary while job is RUNNING (observed during backfill)
checks.actual: Summary returned warning='Labeling is still in progress. Theme filters may shift...' and MonitorPage renders warning-copy
